## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Alastair Adams for the Client Operations Manager role.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Fit:** Alastair's Handshake experience directly matches the role's needs: building ops from scratch, managing tools (Salesforce, Gainsight, Looker), and automating workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Proven Impact:** At Handshake, Alastair automated business review decks with Matic, saving CSMs \>95% of their time (1 hour/deck) and deferring a new hire.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Challenge:** Rapid growth (2 new clients/week) is straining high-touch services, creating a linear headcount problem that requires immediate operational efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Role's Scope:** The role is undefined, focusing initially on tools (Notion, Linear, HubSpot) and data to free up Andi for strategy. It offers the right candidate the chance to "write their own job description."](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Operational Challenge

  - [**Business Model:** Services agency creating marketing content for tech clients.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [**Strategic Shift:** Evolving into a product-led company with a services arm for high-profile clients.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [**Core Problem:** Rapid growth (2 new clients/week) is straining high-touch services, causing headcount to grow linearly.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [**Current State:**](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [**Tools:** Disconnected systems (Notion, Linear, HubSpot).](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Data:** Rudimentary client health/ICP scoring; no standardized reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [**Team:** Andi (Head of Client Ops) is focused on org structure and capacity, needing an executor to manage day-to-day ops.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)

### Alastair's Relevant Experience (Handshake)

  - [**Role:** Built the UK/EU ops function from scratch for Handshake's ed-tech SaaS platform.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [**Scope:** Sole ops person for an 80–90 person team, supporting all GTM functions (Sales, Success, Support, Marketing).](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Tooling Expertise:** Salesforce, Gainsight, Looker, SQL, Zapier, Linear.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Case Study: Automating Business Reviews

  - [**Problem:** CSMs spent 1 hour/customer manually creating monthly business review decks.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implemented Matic, a tool that auto-populates decks from data sources (e.g., BigQuery).](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**Impact:**](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Saved CSMs \>95% of their time.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [Deferred the need to hire another CSM.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

### Operational Philosophy

  - [**Prioritization:** Focus on high-impact, revenue-critical problems. This requires deep communication with all teams to understand their needs.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [**Change Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
      - [**Incentivize:** Make new processes simpler and more automated to drive adoption.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)
      - [**Document:** Provide clear SOPs and training; don't rely on single calls.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [**Conflict Resolution:**](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [**Example:** Resolved go-to-market vs. product team conflict over confusing terminology.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [**Solution:** Created a shared "Product Terminology Resource" in Confluence to standardize definitions.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

### Role Expectations & Growth

  - [**Initial Focus:** Execution on tools and data to free up Andi for strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Decision-Making:** Empowered to make decisions and drive initiatives, provided the rationale is clear.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [**Career Path:** Undefined, offering the right candidate the chance to "write their own job description" as the company evolves.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Andi:** Move Alastair to the next interview stage.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
  - [**Alastair:** Interview with Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/7C98iEb8x3bmynz4A4sJqeb96bdz96Aa?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
